name: ni
description: Use the right package manager - install

options.name: -g
options.description: Operates in 'global' mode, so that packages are installed into the prefix folder instead of the current working directory

options.name: --frozen
options.description: Don't generate a lockfile and fail if an update is needed

generators.custom: _NuFrRa_(n,a)=>D(void 0,null,function*(){let e=n[n.length-1];if(e==="")return[];let d=`curl -s -H "Accept: application/json" "https://api.npms.io/v2/search?size=20&q=${e}"`,m=`curl -s -H "Accept: application/vnd.npm.install-v1+json" https://registry.npmjs.org/${e.slice(0,-1)}`,l=s=>s[s.length-1]==="@"?a(m):a(d),g=e.startsWith("@")?S(e)>1:e.includes("@");try{let s=JSON.parse(yield l(e));if(g){let o=Object.entries(s["dist-tags"]||{}).map(([p,j])=>({name:p,description:j}));return o.push(...Object.keys(s.versions).map(p=>({name:p})).reverse()),o}return s.results.map(o=>({name:o.package.name,description:o.package.description}))}catch(s){return console.error({error:s}),[]}})
